_comment: Synthetic v1 design-handoff candidates for the regression matrix. One satisfiable candidate per label plus a fixed set of failure mutations that each isolate one v1 closure rule. Scored against eval/design-handoff-labels.json by scripts/design-handoff-v1-regression.test.mjs; expected scores in eval/design-handoff-v1-score-baseline.json.
